listings.source_notes: This is a Coming Soon Listing and cannot be shown until 04/02. This charming COASTAL GEM perched in one of the most desirable locations at the shore in a quiet neighborhood yet steps to Belmar beaches, marina and downtown.  Beautifully maintained, this RANCH style home offers a new kitchen with white cabinets & granite counter tops, gleaming hardwood floors and sun filled rooms. Guests will be greeted by an open floor plan, vaulted ceiling and 3 sided fire place.  Ideal for entertaining with a wet bar that gracefully leads to French doors and private deck with hot tub.  Enjoy the day at the beach and wash away the sand in your outdoor shower. Lovingly cared for & impeccably maintained, this home is bound to be a family destination for years to come!

listings.source_notes:
Live. Work. And experience the best of Belmar's coastal lifestyle.

Just a few short blocks from Belmar's beautiful beaches this like-new construction home offers nearly 2200 sq ft of finished space over three levels and features marina views, multiple balconies, and flexible living spaces designed for today's lifestyle.

Set on an oversized lot, the property offers generous outdoor space, an expansive parking pad, and a layout that seamlessly blends living and working from home. Located within Belmar's PO-75 Professional Office Zone, the lower level provides the perfect private workspace, ideal for a professional office, studio, or client-facing business, while still maintaining the comfort and privacy of a residential setting Inside, the home features a beautifully designed interior with low-maintenance luxury vinyl plank flooring, a gourmet kitchen with quartz countertops and premium Kucht and Bosch appliances, and stunning bathrooms with floor-to-ceiling tile and radiant heated floors for spa-like comfort.

The primary suite serves as a peaceful retreat with marina views and its own private balcony, while the open living and dining area also features balcony access and water views, creating the perfect setting for entertaining or simply enjoying the coastal breeze.

Upstairs, discover a fantastic hangout space and additional guest room opening to yet another balcony overlooking the marina, perfect for hosting family and friends after a day at the beach.

The spacious garage offers endless possibilities, easily accommodating a home gym, sauna, or recreation space with foosball and ping-pong, creating the ultimate indoor-outdoor lifestyle when the doors are open.

Additional highlights include a coastal furnishings, fully fenced yard, electric vehicle charging station, surround sound system, and thoughtful upgrades throughout -- no detail overlooked.

A rare gem in Belmar's coastal community, offering the perfect combination of like-new construction, marina views, multiple outdoor spaces, and the flexibility to live and work just moments from the beach.

listings.source_notes: An opportunity to invest along the Jersey Shore like this doesn't come around often. Walking distance to Belmar's beaches, a 6-car private parking lot, and a 3-bay garage make this move-in-ready property so unique. Live in one unit/rent out the other, convert to a single family, or start renting immediately in one of the hottest beach towns in New Jersey. This is what you've been waiting for. Schedule your appointment today.

listings.source_notes: Rare find! Beach block home with a pool! This amazing offering is just seconds to the sand and boardwalk and ready for creating memories with your friends and family at the shore. This newer built home features 5 BR 5 Bath, open concept kitchen/ living /dining, sought after 1st floor Bed/Bath, chef's kitchen w/ large center island for the whole crew, pantry/storage, first & second floor laundry rooms, large primary bedroom w/ walk-in and ensuite bathroom w/ heated floors, double vanity + makeup vanity and more. You will love the bonus room on 3rd floor for flex space, garage, back deck for entertaining and inground pool to relax after a day at the beach. Other features include: Hardie siding, Anderson windows/sliders, Nest thermostats, shiplap, coffered ceilings in family/living room, built ins, Dacor 48" range/oven w/ pot filler for convenient cooking, Wolf microwave drawer and so much more. This home is near all the local hot spots including train to NYC, downtown, marina for boating and excellent restaurants. Act today and secure this rare offering to get settled and enjoy summer 2026!

listings.source_notes: Prime Jersey Shore Location - Belmar Gem! Exceptional opportunity in one of Belmar's most desirable locations. Situated on a 40x100 lot just two blocks from the beach and Djais, one block from Lake Como, and a short walk to Spring Lake. Ideal as a year-round residence, summer getaway, or investment property with strong rental potential. The property offers the flexibility to renovate or rebuild and create your dream home at the Jersey Shore. Don't miss this chance to own in a prime coastal location.

listings.source_notes:
Studio Condo in the North End of Belmar
Live the coastal lifestyle in this charming just one block from the beach in beautiful Belmar, NJ—home to one of the Jersey Shore's most beloved beaches. This well-maintained unit offers the perfect blend of convenience and comfort, featuring:

Assigned parking for hassle-free beach days and summer weekends
A private storage cage in the lower level for all your beach gear, bikes, or seasonal items. Easy access to local restaurants, cafes, and shops. A vibrant community atmosphere, ideal for year-round living or a weekend getaway Whether you're looking for a personal retreat or a smart investment, this studio offers unbeatable location and lifestyle. Don't miss your chance to own a slice of the shore!  Unit must be owned for 2 yrs before renting.

listings.source_notes: Waterfront Shore Colonial in one of Bradley Beach's most desirable locations overlooking Fletcher Lake and just a block and a half to the beach! This 2 bedroom, 1.5 bath home features an updated kitchen, central air, and off-street parking with a private driveway. Enjoy an array of outdoor spaces, including a classic front porch, two second-floor decks--one with partial ocean and lake views--and a private backyard. --perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Prime location close to the beach, boardwalk, town, restaurants, and train to NYC. Ideal as a year-round residence, beach house, or investment property! | Private driveway • Updated kitchen • Central air

listings.source_notes: Welcome to your turnkey coastal retreat! Situated in the charming town of Lake Como, this 2 bed, 1 bath home is just mins from pristine beaches and lively boardwalks. The inviting foyer leads into a bright living area featuring impressive vaulted ceilings. The heart of the home is the beautifully appointed eat-in kitchen, complete with granite countertops and white shaker cabinetry. Through the kitchen there is a dedicated laundry/mudroom that leads to your private backyard oasis. Outdoor living excels with a spacious deck, patio, grill included, and an essential outdoor shower. The detached, Large, finished shed with electricity offers endless possibilities as a she-shed, man cave, or home | 3,049 sq ft lot • Built 1930 • Listed 2 days | COMING SOON | This is a coming soon listing & can't be shown until 4/7/26. Just 2 blocks to the beach, on a quiet tree-lined street, this single family w/ two rentals is ideal for owner-occupants & investors alike! This 1298sf remodeled 3BR Craftsman offers a breezy porch, wood floors, central air, laundry, reno'd bath with dual vanity & large tiled shower, and custom white Shaker kitchen w/ quartz surfaces, custom backsplash, under-cab lighting & s/s appliances. There is a Yankee basement, long paved driveway, outdoor shower & yard. The rear building consists of two rental units. Downstairs is a remodeled 700sf 2BR with in-unit w/ d, Shaker cabs, granite & s/s apps. U

listings.source_notes: MONMOUTH ARMS has a Brilliant 2 bed 1 bath condo east of Rt 71 which is a straight shoot to the ocean and town. Enjoy this simple condo, second floor, end unit, with views of the Spring Lake golf course. Outdoor space to have a little area and take in the breezes. Original wood floors, many windows for brightness in the entire unit. Nice living room, dining room, easy kitchen for cooking. Plenty of closets that are generous in storage. This could be your summer place, annual living, investment property or even first time home buyer. Easy to show, ready for new owner. STRICTLY SOLD AS IS. This is an estate, no repairs or credits. | Many windows • Original wood floors • Generous in storage

listings.source_notes: Shore stunner! Renovated/restored by previous owner & lovingly maintained by its current one, this Belmar beauty is sure to impress. Whether it's taking in the ocean breezes on the rocking chair front porch or enjoying the ample living space with your family, this beautiful home will not disappoint! Walk in to a large foyer which flows nicely into the living room, it is flanked on each side by a sun room & an office, . The level is completed by a well appointed kitchen, dining room & half bath. The 2nd floor has 4brs/2baths, including the en suite primary w/ walk in closet, as well as laundry. Finally, walk up to the 3rd level w/ 2 more brs & full bath, plus a walkou | Pocket doors • Large island • Wolf stove

listings.source_notes: A rare chance to build your ideal coastal home in one of New Jersey's most desirable beach communities. This beach-block corner lot with river views, in Avon-by-the-Sea, offers a prime setting for a custom shore home. Surrounded by charming coastal properties, this exceptional parcel provides the perfect foundation to bring your vision to life. Enjoy the relaxed elegance and convenience of Avon-by-the-Sea, located just about 60 minutes from Manhattan. Offered at $3.1M as an upfront, as-is land purchase. Let us pair you with our partner prominent local builder and architect with an all-in price of around $4.99M. If you prefer a blank canvas, bring your own vision, architect, and builder. Pro | 7,500 sq ft lot • Garage • Pool

listings.source_notes: Welcome to your serene coastal retreat at the historic Hewitt Wellington in the heart of Spring Lake. Originally built in the early 1900s, this iconic property reflects the classic Victorian and Shingle-Style architecture that defines Spring Lake's grand seaside heritage. For generations, visitors from New York and Philadelphia have been drawn to this refined coastal community for its quiet beaches, gracious homes, and timeless charm. The Hewitt Wellington has remained one of Spring Lake's most recognizable landmarks, overlooking the tranquil waters of Spring Lake and offering the elegance and character that make this town so beloved. This beautifully appointed first-floor suite and deeded | Working fireplace • $1,064 HOA • Garage

listings.source_notes: PREMIUM DEVELOPMENT OPPORTUNITY in Spring Lake Heights! A corner parcel with two existing deeds and an existing structure (teardown). The property offers the potential to construct two single-family residences (subject to municipal approvals). The parcel is not located in a flood zone, eliminating elevation requirements and flood insurance considerations—a valuable advantage in this coastal market. The configuration provides enhanced design flexibility, curb appeal, and independent lot orientation. Ideal for builders or investors seeking a scalable, low-risk development opportunity surrounded by high-value new construction and close proximity to beaches, downtown Spring Lake, and majo | Existing structure • Corner parcel • 0.37 acre lot | Prime Jersey Shore Location - Belmar Gem! Exceptional opportunity in one of Belmar's most desirable locations. Situated on a 40x100 lot just two blocks from the beach and Djais, one block from Lake Como, and a short walk to Spring Lake. Ideal as a year-round residence, summer getaway, or investment property with strong rental potential. The property offers the flexibility to renovate or rebuild and create your dream home at the Jersey Shore. Don't miss this chance to own in a prime coastal location.
